---
title: 'Sea Siam in Keller - Best Thai in Texas!'
date: '2012-02-08T22:51:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'LIFE in Review (s)'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '3011103000399081551'
blogger_filename: '/2012/02/sea-siam-in-keller-best-thai-in-texas.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/LIFE in Review (s)/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Discover'
---

<br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;"><strong style="color: black;"><a data-mce-href="http://maps.google.com/maps/place?hl=en&amp;rlz=1C1GPCK_enUS434US434&amp;nord=1&amp;gs_upl=&amp;bav=on.2,or.r_gc.r_pw.r_cp.,cf.osb&amp;ion=1&amp;biw=1298&amp;bih=683&amp;um=1&amp;ie=UTF-8&amp;q=thai+keller&amp;fb=1&amp;gl=us&amp;hq=thai+keller&amp;cid=4344287535141297151" href="http://maps.google.com/maps/place?hl=en&amp;rlz=1C1GPCK_enUS434US434&amp;nord=1&amp;gs_upl=&amp;bav=on.2,or.r_gc.r_pw.r_cp.,cf.osb&amp;ion=1&amp;biw=1298&amp;bih=683&amp;um=1&amp;ie=UTF-8&amp;q=thai+keller&amp;fb=1&amp;gl=us&amp;hq=thai+keller&amp;cid=4344287535141297151" style="color: #743399;" target="_blank">Sea Siam</a>&nbsp;940 Keller Pkwy # 230, Keller, TX 76248-3657 &nbsp;(817) 431-1581&nbsp;â€Ž</strong></div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;"><strong style="color: black;">Thai&nbsp;Dilemma&nbsp;</strong></div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">I am always looking for a good Thai restaurant. There are many types of food that I enjoy, but it seems like Thai is always my go to. I don't have it often, but when I do I always wonder why it's been so long?! However, in Texas Thai is not as easy to find as it was in California. Not good Thai anyway. Finally I happen upon this restaurant after a job interview in Keller. A REAL Thai restaurant with food made by Real Thai's!</div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">In fact, it turns out the owners came from California and I used to eat at their old restaurant! Imagine the thrill I have that God would move them to Texas just for me?!</div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;"><strong style="color: black;">Good Service</strong></div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">Sure enough, the Sea Siam is no&nbsp;disappointment. If you are looking for&nbsp;Americanized&nbsp;watered down Thai... keep looking this isn't it. This is the real deal, authentic, Thai Food. It's a small hole in the wall type building but the owners are VERY friendly! They go out of their way to help you, which is more than I can say for most Thai Restaurants.</div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">The pattern of the great taste of Thai Food combined with absolutely horrible service has always bewildered me. How can one class of food have such&nbsp;universally&nbsp;bad service? But Sea Siam looks to change that pattern. Sea Siam's family owned and operated restaurant is a gem among Thai Food. Not only do they taste better but they smile and talk to you! Imagine that?</div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;"><strong style="color: black;">Great Food:</strong></div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">My favorite food at any Thai restaurant is Red Curry with Chicken and Bamboo shoots. We always get that, along with Pad Thai, Thai Salad, Rice, Side of Peanut Sauce, Thai Iced Tea, and a generous tip to the waitress! Total Bill is usually around $20-30 for all that.</div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">I'll add pictures the next time I go!</div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;">If you are in the mood for real Thai, or haven't had it but want to try it I strongly suggest taking a drive to Keller, Texas and going to Sea Siam!</div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;"><a data-mce-href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/r/13/182129/restaurant/Sea-Siam-Keller" href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/r/13/182129/restaurant/Sea-Siam-Keller" style="color: #743399;"><img alt="Sea Siam on Urbanspoon" data-mce-src="/images/imported/www-urbanspoon-com/biglink-c4d7e1ad4d32.gif" data-mce-style="border: none; width: 200px; height: 146px;" src="/images/imported/www-urbanspoon-com/biglink-c4d7e1ad4d32.gif" style="border: none; cursor: default; height: 146px; margin: 0px; width: 200px;" /></a></div><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, 'Lucida Grande', Verdana, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; margin-bottom: 24px;"><strong style="color: black;">Darrell G. Wolfe</strong><br /><strong style="color: black;"><br /></strong><br /><div style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;"><b>Have questions about anything I said here? Want to share your story? Comment Below!</b></div><div style="color: black; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; font-size: medium;"></div><br /><br /><b>Texas Living Info by&nbsp;</b><b><span style="font-size: x-small;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span></b><br /><br />Blog:&nbsp;<a href="http://texaslivinginfo.blogspot.com/" target="_blank">http://texaslivinginfo.blogspot.com/&nbsp;</a><br />Facebook:&nbsp;<a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Texas-Living-Info/134949299934749">https://www.facebook.com/pages/Texas-Living-Info/134949299934749</a><br />Twitter:&nbsp;<a href="http://twitter.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">http://twitter.com/n2goodsuccess</a><br /><br /><b style="background-color: white;">See Also:</b><br />Other Blogs by Darrell:<br /><a href="http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/">http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/</a><br />&nbsp;<a href="http://n2gs.blogspot.com/">http://n2gs.blogspot.com/</a><br />Books by Darrell G. Wolfe:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.amazon.com/Darrell-Wolfe/e/B008F07FO6" style="font-family: verdana, arial, helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 13px;" target="_blank">Amazon.com/author/darrellgwolfe&nbsp;</a><br />Book Suggestions from the&nbsp;<a href="http://astore.amazon.com/your0f4d-20/190-6424964-9305846" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Amazon Store</a><br />Brand and Product Offerings from&nbsp;<a href="http://www.zazzle.com/n2goodsuccess" target="_blank">N2 Good Success Zazzle Store</a><br />Other Blogs and Sites by the Wolfe Family:&nbsp;<a href="http://wfconceptions.wordpress.com/" target="_blank">http://wfconceptions.wordpress.com/&nbsp;</a><br /><br /><br /><div class="fb-comments" data-href="http://texaslivinginfo.blogspot.com/" data-num-posts="10" data-width="470"></div>---<br /><br /><br /></div>
